title: kedrostis dissecta
intro: Kedrostis dissecta, also known as the 'vegetable ivory', is a species of flowering plant in the family Cucurbitaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and is valued for its unique, ivory-colored tubers that resemble elephant ivory. The plant has been traditionally used in African medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The tubers can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which provide health benefits like pain relief, wound healing, and improved digestion.
